modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Logitech wireless keyboard not connecting to MacOS or Windows.

full_description_text: The user reported that their Logitech wireless keyboard is not functioning. They mentioned that it was previously working but has suddenly stopped connecting to both MacOS and Windows systems. This issue is affecting their ability to use the keyboard effectively.
short_description: Logitech wireless keyboard not connecting to MacOS or Windows.
description: The user reported that their Logitech wireless keyboard is not functioning. They mentioned that it was previously working but has suddenly stopped connecting to both MacOS and Windows systems. This issue is affecting their ability to use the keyboard effectively.
